name: Creole Coffee Ice Cream Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs at high speed until slightly thickened.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until the mixture is smooth and very thick.
3. Add the coffee and bourbon; mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into a punch bowl or large pitcher.
5. Spoon in the ice cream; stir well. Allow the ice cream to melt slightly to flavor the punch, then serve immediately.
